title: GLRI Act of 2025
plain_summary: The GLRI Act of 2025 continues a program that works to protect and clean up the Great Lakes. The bill gives this program 500 million dollars every year from 2027 through 2031. This money will be used for projects that help restore the health of the Great Lakes. The funding comes from changes made to an existing law about water pollution.
last_action_text: Referred to the Subcommittee on Water Resources and Environment.

sections.title: Section 1 Short Title
sections.text: This law can be called the Great Lakes Restoration Initiative Act of two thousand twenty five or the GLRI Act of two thousand twenty five.

sections.title: Section 2 Great Lakes Restoration Initiative Reauthorization
sections.text: This section changes an existing law called the Federal Water Pollution Control Act. It updates the part that talks about money for the Great Lakes Restoration Initiative. The change adds funding of five hundred million dollars for each year from two thousand twenty seven through two thousand thirty one. This money will be available to help restore and protect the Great Lakes.
